calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Power Of Attorney'S Authorization To Prepare And Fund Revocable Living Trust; And To Execute A Pour-Over Will Pc Sections 4260-4266
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court took the Petition for Power of Attorney's Authorization to Prepare and fund Revocable Living Trust, etc., off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION Petition For Power Of Attorney'S Authorization To Prepare And Fund Revocable Living Trust; And To Execute A Pour-Over Will Pc Sections 4260-4266
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Jul-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Bartholomew Ribotta.

Ms. Stoneman stated that she read the examiner's notes, that Ms. Lively is incapacitated, that she thought that the theory of the code would apply and that she was hoping that the handwritten will could be turned into a trust. The court stated that if this matter were to go forward the appropriate Points and Authorities would need to be filed to support her petition. The Petition for Power of Attorney's Authorization to Prepare and Fund Revocable Living Trust, etc., was continued to July 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the instruction that Points & Authorities are to be filed at least one week prior to this date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
